The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing pain, inflammation, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Menadenium include alkaloids, glycosides, and terpenoids, such as menadenine and menispermone, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Menadenium is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions, including pain management and anxiety relief.
